summary: Verified BackOfficeLeverage text-spillover fix on /advisory. All 6 requested checks pass on desktop 1440x900 and mobile 375x812.
critical_code_review_comments: None. Component is small, self-contained, uses tailwind grid-cols-1 sm:grid-cols-2 for pointers, lg:grid-cols-2 for outer layout, and flex flex-col justify-center so text column vertically centres relative to the 16:10 video. Copy is tight and does not overflow at either viewport.
context_for_next_testing_agent: Layout fix verified. Standalone script at /app/tests/test_backoffice_layout.py can be rerun with /opt/plugins-venv/bin/python. Note: the MCP browser_automation tool has a Python-parser quirk where JS `{}` literals inside evaluate() strings and dict literals like `clip={...}` on the same line as a call cause 'closing parenthesis does not match opening parenthesis' pre-parse errors -- workaround is to store JS strings in module-level constants and use a plain playwright script (as done here).

desktop_1440x900.heading_italic_tail_text: at a fraction of the cost
